raw: Type of pass: Returnable, must be picked up from the library the day before or the day of your reservation date. Pricing: Reduced standard daytime admission for up to 4 people at 50% off per person. Additional instructions: -Present pass upon arrival to receive discount. -Special events and performances are not eligible for this discount. THIS PASS MUST BE RETURNED TO THE MORSE INSTITUTE LIBRARY BY 9:30AM THE DAY AFTER YOUR RESERVATION. OVERDUE FINES ARE $3/DAY. Passes can be returned at the circulation desk or the outside book drops.
